SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.event

Class MoveEvent

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.event.MoveEvent
public final class MoveEvent extends Object
Immutable event object representing game actions with metadata. Primary communication mechanism between game system components.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource)
    Constructs a MoveEvent with type and source.
    MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource, long timestamp, Object additionalData)
    Constructs a MoveEvent with all parameters.
    MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource, Object additionalData)
    Constructs a MoveEvent with type, source, and additional data.

    Gets the timestamp when the event occurred.

    Checks if this event is a drop event (HARD_DROP, SOFT_DROP).
    boolean

    Checks if this event is a movement event (LEFT, RIGHT, DOWN).
    boolean
    isRotationEvent()
    Checks if this event is a rotation event (ROTATE, ROTATE_CCW).
    boolean
    isUserEvent()
    Checks if this event originated from user input.

  • Constructor Details

    • MoveEvent

      public MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource)
      Constructs a MoveEvent with type and source. Timestamp is automatically set to current time.
      Parameters:
      eventType - Event type
      eventSource - Event source

    • MoveEvent

      public MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource, Object additionalData)
      Constructs a MoveEvent with type, source, and additional data. Timestamp is automatically set to current time.
      Parameters:
      eventType - Event type
      eventSource - Event source
      additionalData - Optional additional data

    • MoveEvent

      public MoveEvent(EventType eventType, EventSource eventSource, long timestamp, Object additionalData)
      Constructs a MoveEvent with all parameters.
      Parameters:
      eventType - Event type
      eventSource - Event source
      timestamp - Event timestamp in milliseconds
      additionalData - Optional additional data

  • Method Details

    • getEventType

      public EventType getEventType()
      Gets the event type.
      Returns:
      EventType

    • getEventSource

      public EventSource getEventSource()
      Gets the event source.
      Returns:
      EventSource

    • getTimestamp

      public long getTimestamp()
      Gets the timestamp when the event occurred.
      Returns:
      The timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.

    • getAdditionalData

      public Object getAdditionalData()
      Gets the additional data associated with the event.
      Returns:
      The additional data, or null if none.

    • isMovementEvent

      public boolean isMovementEvent()
      Checks if this event is a movement event (LEFT, RIGHT, DOWN).
      Returns:
      true if the event is a movement event, false otherwise.

    • isRotationEvent

      public boolean isRotationEvent()
      Checks if this event is a rotation event (ROTATE, ROTATE_CCW).
      Returns:
      true if the event is a rotation event, false otherwise.

    • isDropEvent

      public boolean isDropEvent()
      Checks if this event is a drop event (HARD_DROP, SOFT_DROP).
      Returns:
      true if the event is a drop event, false otherwise.

    • isUserEvent

      public boolean isUserEvent()
      Checks if this event originated from user input.
      Returns:
      true if the event source is USER, false otherwise.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this MoveEvent.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A string representation of the event.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Checks if this event is equal to another object.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - The object to compare with.
      Returns:
      true if the objects are equal, false otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code for this MoveEvent.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      A hash code for the event.
